_comment: Economics deliverable for 4th & Madison (demo fixture). Value-creation waterfall + annual cashflow per skills/decarb-plan/references/audette-modeling-recipes.md section 8. Gross vs landlord-share capture applied per capture_map (below); solar VNM capture is 0.80. headline_pct and measure_reconciled_pct are both the plan's full-implementation emissions reduction (%), computed two ways (top-down baseline-vs-target, and bottom-up sum of per-measure emissions deltas) and are equal by construction -- see reconciliation note at the end of this file.

central_gas_plant.source: Office building base-building HVAC/DHW plant -- landlord-paid and landlord-invested regardless of lease structure; central-plant loads are 100% owner even where suite-level loads are tenant-metered.

common_lighting.source: Base-building common-area and garage lighting -- landlord-paid.

rooftop_solar.source: Virtual net metering (VNM) revenue-sharing arrangement -- 80% of generation value flows to landlord per standard VNM capture convention.

headline_basis: Full-implementation (all 3 phases) site emissions reduction vs. baseline: (3,598.9 - 2,837.8) / 3,598.9 = 21.15%, rounded to 1 decimal.
measure_reconciled_basis: Sum of the 6 measures' per-measure emissions deltas (measures.json) divided by baseline emissions: 761.1 / 3,598.9 = 21.15%, rounded to 1 decimal. Identical to headline_pct by construction (top-down baseline-vs-target and bottom-up measure sum are the same underlying arithmetic, computed two ways as a reconciliation check).
energy_reduction_basis: Full-implementation site energy reduction: (11,200,000 - 8,100,000) / 11,200,000 kWh/yr = 27.6%. Reported separately from the carbon headline per reporting standard (kWh reduction and tCO2e reduction are distinct metrics; gas is fully eliminated by Year 6 while electricity rises modestly from electrification before efficiency/solar bring it back down).

utility_escalation.note: Soapbox default escalation assumptions -- confirmed at kickoff, not silently chosen. Stabilized (full-run-rate) $/yr figures below are Year-1-equivalent before this escalation is layered into the annual cashflow.

waterfall.note: baseline_capex_usd_context_only is disclosure only (like-for-like replacement spend the plan sits on top of) and is NOT summed into net_value_creation, per the waterfall convention. Solar's generation value is modeled entirely within capitalized_utility_savings (as an 80%-capture electricity offset), not as a separate ancillary-revenue line, for this plan -- documented modeling choice.

landlord_share_annual_utility_savings_us.note: All measures at 100% owner capture (central plant / common lighting, all landlord-paid) except solar PV at 80% per VNM capture convention (demo-4m-M6-solar-pv: $98,000 gross x 0.80 = $78,400 landlord share).

bps_fine_avoidance.pv_years_discounted: Year 6 through Year 10 (5 years of the 10-year hold, discounted at 8%)

annual_cashflow_note: Simplified to stabilized (non-escalated) $/yr figures per phase for demo legibility -- a full render would apply the confirmed utility_escalation year-over-year. asset_value_impact_usd is booked in the exit year (Year 10) only, = stabilized landlord utility savings net of subscription fee ($232,792 - $45,000 = $187,792) capitalized at the 6.0% exit cap.

irr.irr_incremental_basis: IRR on the full unlevered_incremental_cashflow stream above (incremental capex + landlord-share utility savings + subscription drag + BPS fine avoidance + terminal asset value impact at exit).
irr.irr_excl_exit_basis: Same cashflow stream excluding the Year-10 terminal asset_value_impact_usd -- isolates the plan's opex/incentive-only return before crediting exit-value capitalization.
irr.interpretation: This deep-electrification package is NOI-capitalization-negative over the 10-year hold even after incentives and BPS fine avoidance -- an honest, common outcome for full-electrification plans where Phase 3 (central plant heat-pump conversion) carries most of the capex with near-breakeven opex savings. The plan is economically justified primarily by regulatory risk avoidance (BPS fine exposure, still open at 693,124 USD PV even after the plan) and asset repositioning ahead of the 2032 compliance deadline, not by direct IRR. Phase 1 alone (envelope + DHW HPWH + lighting/controls) has materially better standalone economics and could be executed independently of Phases 2-3.
irr.irr_hurdle_note: No explicit irr_hurdle was recorded in kickoff for this demo fixture (see decarb_plan_state.json kickoff.irr_hurdle = null) -- the negative IRR above is reported as-is, not screened against a hurdle.
